title: rhododendron calostrotum subsp. riparium
intro: Rhododendron calostrotum subsp. riparium is a subspecies of rhododendron, a flowering plant native to China. The leaves and flowers of Rhododendron calostrotum subsp. riparium have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as supporting the respiratory and digestive systems. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron calostrotum subsp. riparium include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
